description.ko: 엄격한 질서와 시스템 오류의 혼란스러운 아름다움 사이의 긴장을 나타내는 디지털 초상화입니다.
description.en: A digital portrait representing the tension between rigid order and the chaotic beauty of a system failure.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian mask of KURO-X undergoing a violent, mathematically perfect geometric deconstruction. The structure fractures into thousands of sharp #808080 and #C0C0C0 polygonal shards and pixel-sorted fragments, suspended in a clinical #FFFFFF digital vacuum. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, scanlines, and intense chromatic aberration cut through the composition. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp ray-traced reflections. 8k resolution, Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic.
